name: COMFORT INN AND SUITES RAPID CITY

violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Cabinet under 3-comp sink needs repaired to working order. Doors need repaired.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Several floor tiles are loose and need of repair or replacement.
